title: Tender Italian Beef Frittata
description: A fresh and pillowy Italian dish featuring beef flank steak, perfect for a lazy Sunday morning, with a yuzu cure and macrobiotic friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, salt, and black pepper.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium high heat and cook the beef until browned.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
In a small bowl, whisk together yuzu juice and a pinch of salt.
Add the yuzu cure to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Pour the whisked eggs over the beef mixture in the skillet.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes or until the eggs are set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle chopped parsley over the top.
Let the frittata cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
